I AM THE CHANGE
Scholarship Program — Home Visit Questionnaire
Team Everest | Confidential

--- Page 1 ---

**Volunteer Name:** RAJESH KUMAR S
**Co-Volunteer Name:** -
**Date of Visit:** 28/06/2026

**Section 1 — Student Profile**
**1.1 Application ID:** TEMP-2026-8503
**1.2 Student Full Name:** RITHIKA K.K
**1.3 Gender:** [●] Female [○] Male [○] Others

**Section 2 — Family Background**
**2.1 Family Status:** [●] Having both parents [○] Single Parent [○] Parentless
**2.2 Relationship Details (if applicable)**
**Year of Death / Separation:** NIL
**Reason for Death / Separation:** 
**2.3 Is Father/Mother photograph kept at home?:** [●] Yes [○] No
**2.4 Government ID Verified (Ration Card / Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Voter ID):** [●] Aadhaar Card [○] Ration Card [○] Driving Licence [○] Voter ID
**2.5 Family Members**
| Name            | Age | Education | Occupation | Annual Income  |
|------------------|-----|-----------|------------|-----------------|
| KARTHIKA K      | 36  | 12th STD  | NIL        | NIL             |
| KARUNADHI.C     | 49  | 10th STD  | DRIVER     | Rs. 1,80,000/-  |

--- Page 2 ---

**Section 3 — Housing Condition**
**

--- Page 2 ---

3.1 House Ownership:** [○] Own [●] Rented
**3.1.1 If rented, what is the rent amount?:** Rs. 6,500/- per month
**3.2 Type of Home**
[○] Individual
[○] Private Apartment
[○] Housing Board
[●] Line House
[—] Others: 
**3.3 Type of Ceiling**
[○] Roof (Kural)
[○] Tiled
[○] Asbestos
[●] Concrete
**3.4 Number of Bedrooms:** 1
**3.4.1 Type of Bedroom:** [●] Separate Bedroom [○] No Separate Bedroom
**3.5 Bathroom:** [●] Separate [○] Common for Apartment
**3.6 Kitchen Type**
[●] Separate Kitchen
[●] Hall with Kitchen

--- Page 3 ---

**Section 4 — Financial Background**
**4.1 Assets at Home (tick all that apply)**
[●] Washing Machine  [●] Fridge  [✗] AC  [✗] LED TV  [✗] Two-Wheeler  [✗] Car  [●] Smartphone  [●] Separate Wi-Fi  [—] Others
**

--- Page 3 ---

4.2 Amount of Last Electricity Bill:** Rs. 600/-
**4.3 Do you own any other assets/properties in the name of grandparents, parents, or student?:** [●] Yes [✗] No
**4.3.1 If yes, list their properties:**
| Property Description | Owner Name | Approximate Value |
|---------------------|-------------|-------------------|
|                     |             |                   |
**

--- Page 4 ---

4.4 Apart from your job, is there any other source of income?:** [○] Yes [●] No
**4.4.1 If yes, list other sources of income:**
| Source of Income | Amount |
|-------------------|--------|
|                   |        |
**4.5 Income Type:** [●] Monthly [○] Daily [○] Weekly [○] Ad-Hoc
**4.6 Do you have any loans?:** [●] Yes [○] No
**4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount**
| Sr. No. | Loan Purpose                  | Loan Amount Taken | Pending Loan Amount |
|---------|-------------------------------|--------------------|---------------------|
| 1       | Last year for school purpose   | 90,000/-           | 50,000/-            |
| 2       | For school payment             | 60,000/-           | 21,000/-            |
| 3       | For school education only      | 20,000/-           | 1,200/-             |
**

--- Page 5 ---

4.7 If you choose any college, how much is the college fee?:** Rs. 85,000/- per semester / Rs. 1,30,000/- per year (self financing course taken)
**4.8 If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it?:** From any loan
**4.9 If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees?:** From any loan

--- Page 4 ---

**Section 5 — Health Information**
**5.1 Does the student have any health issues?:** [○] Yes [●] No
**5.2 If yes, list the health issues:** NIL

--- Page 5 ---

**Section 6 — Student Commitment**
**6.1 Will you study college for three years without any obstacle?:** Yes
**6.2 If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come?:** [●] Yes [○] No [○] Maybe
**

--- Page 6 ---

6.3 Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)?:** [●] Yes [○] No

--- Page 6 ---

**Section 7 — Scholarship Information**
**7.1 Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree?:** [●] No

**Section 8 — Volunteer Observation**
**8.1 What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition?:** 1) The parents taken self financing course degree instead of choosing govt. fees college & chosen reputed college W.C.C college Nungambakkam, so they are well prepared for the money even without getting any scholarship. 2) Their house also decent & not very poor
**8.2 Will you recommend this student for this scholarship?:** [○] Yes [●] No [○] Not Sure
**8.3 Any other comments you want to share?:** I do not recommend this student for this scholarship as there are other poor well deserving students desperate for this scholarship.

--- Page 6 ---
